Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Coen Company, Inc. To Provide Responses To Forom Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Christine Renken, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Frank Dugan, Antonia Dugan. No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Frank Dugan, Antonia Dugan's Motion To Compel Defendant Coen Company, Inc. To Provide Responses To Form Interrogatories, And For Sanctions.
-Motion To Compel Defendant Coen Company, Inc. To Provide Responses To Form Interrogatories, And For Sanctions GRANTED.
-Defendant Coen Company, Inc. shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories within five days of the date of this order.
-All objections are deemed waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges.
-Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $350.00, to be paid within 30 days of this order. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. Not Reported
